zh.Bad Doberan, Rostock, Western Pomerania,: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇梅可倫波格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Sambiria於1233年出生在德國海因里希_包莫時，她的父親Sambor II Duke of Pomerania22歲，母親Matilda of Mecklenburg24歲。她於1248年與Christopher I of Denmark在丹麥奧本哈福哥本哈根結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1282年12月1日在德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫藍德可萊斯 羅斯托克享年49歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇梅可倫波格。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Sambiria was born in 1233, in Pomerania, Prussia, Germany, her father, Sambor II Duke of Pomerania, was 22 and her mother, Matilda of Mecklenburg, was 24. She married Christopher I of Denmark in 1248, in Copenhagen, København, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 December 1282, in Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germany, at the age of 49, and was buried in Mecklenburg, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.Of, Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Danemark
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Sambiria est née en 1233, à Pommern, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Sambor II Duke of Pomerania, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Matilda of Mecklenburg, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher I of Denmark en 1248, à Copenhague, København, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 décembre 1282, à Landkreis Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Mecklenburg, Saint-Empire romain.

de.Of, Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: Roskilde, Roskilde Domsogn, Sømme, København, Dänemark
de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Sambiria 1233 in Pommern, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sambor II Duke of Pomerania 22 und ihre Mutter Matilda of Mecklenburg 24. Sie hat 1248 in Kopenhagen, København, Dänemark Christopher I of Denmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Dezember 1282 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Landkreis Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Deutschland und wurde in Mecklenburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

Lei sposato Christopher I of Denmark nel 1248, nel København, København, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 dicembre 1282, nel Landkreis Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Germania, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Mecklenburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Sambiriaが1233年にドイツプレウssンポンメルンで生まれた時，父Sambor II Duke of Pomeraniaは22歳，母Matilda of Mecklenburgは24歳であった。1248年にデンマーククoベンハヴンクoベンハヴンでChristopher I of Denmarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1282年12月1日にドイツメックレンブルグ-ボルプオンメルンランドクレイス ロストックで49歳で死去し，ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチメックレンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Of, Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: 덴마크 ko벤하브 스o 로스킬드 돔소그 로스킬드
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Sambiria(이)가 1233년 독일 플레우ss 폼머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sambor II Duke of Pomerania(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda of Mecklenburg(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1248년 덴마크 ko벤하브 코펜하겐에서 Christopher I of Denmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1282년 12월 1일 독일 클렌버그-보르폼머 랜드크레이스 로스톡에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 클렌버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Sambiria nasceu em 1233, em Pommern, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Sambor II Duke of Pomerania, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Matilda of Mecklenburg, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Christopher I of Denmark em 1248, em København, København, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1282, em Landkreis Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemanha, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Mecklenburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.Of, Roskilde, Kobenhavn, Denmark: роскаилд, роскаилд домсогн, сoмм, кoбенавн, Дания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Sambiria родилась в 1233 г. в местности поммирн, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Sambor II Duke of Pomerania было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda of Mecklenburg, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher I of Denmark в 1248 г. в местности Копенгаген, кoбенавн, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 декабря 1282 г. в местности ландкрис ростокк, меккленбург-ворпоммирн, Германия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности меккленбург, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

Se casó con Christopher I of Denmark en 1248, en København, København, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de diciembre de 1282, en Landkreis Rostock, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Alemania, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Mecklenburg, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
